response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical breadth, strong open-source contributions, and leadership in project creation, but lacks explicit experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and client-facing technical advisory roles, and his German proficiency is only basic despite the C1 requirement, while his recent career gap and lack of formal team management experience raise concerns about executive readiness.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content/workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or client advisory experience
Recent career gap and lack of documented team leadership in consulting environment
